string.text: Shelter: escape from the powerful emission
Escape from the powerful emission by taking shelter at "100 Rads" Bar.
Shelter: don't abandon Borland
Don't abandon Borland, stick together.
Talk to Barkeep
Talk with Barkeep at "100 Rads" Bar.
New details: talk to Barkeep
Talk to Barkeep to learn useful information.
New details: talk to Borland
Talk to Borland, share the details about the artifact and persuade him to cooperate with Barkeep.
Expectation: wait for Barkeep's message
In two days, you need to tell your decision about whether to cooperate or not to Barkeep.
Expectation: talk to Barkeep
Tell Barkeep that you'll cooperate.
Cooperation: talk to Voronin
Talk to the leader of Duty, Voronin, and gather information.
Cooperation: help Voronin
Help Voronin by standing guard at the checkpoint.
Cooperation: talk to Barkeep
Talk to Barkeep.
Dangerous duty: wait for your shift
Await your shift, which starts at 18:00.
Dangerous duty: talk to the captain of the guard
Talk to the captain of the guard and receive instructions.
Dangerous duty: guard the area
Repel mutant attacks at any cost.
House in the swamp: find the house
Locate the house in the forest.
House in the swamp: talk with Hermit
Talk with Hermit and learn about the way into the laboratory.
House in the swamp: find the artifact
Try to find the artifact.
House in the swamp: kill the madman
Hermit has completely lost his mind, eliminate him.
House in the swamp: search Hermit's corpse
Search Hermit's corpse to find the key.
Descent into the Laboratory: find the entrance of Lab X-14
Locate the entrance of Laboratory X-14.
Arena: talk to Crusher
Talk to Crusher the Arena runner about the fights in the Arena.
Arena: turn in equipment
Turn in the equipment and loot to Crusher after the fight at the Arena.
Arena: enter the Arena
Enter the Arena for the next fight.
Arena: arrange a Partner fight
Speak with one of the participants and arrange a Partner fight.
Arena: arrange a Bodyguard fight
Speak with one of the participants and arrange a Bodyguard fight.
Arena: retrieve your equipment
Retrieve your equipment from the safe in the Arena.
Arena: collect the reward for the fight
Collect your reward for the fight from Kalgan.
Special training: complete the EW training course

Nitro informed you about the current situation involving the mysterious disappearances of stalkers. According to the plan, you must complete the special radio operator training course to counter the unknown extremist group.
Special training: return to the Duty technician
The training course has been completed. Now you will be able to help Duty in carrying out a special operation to identify and eliminate troublemakers.
Bait: measure the radio signal in the first area
Head to the abandoned hangar and take the necessary measurements at the specified point.
Bait: record readings from the area
Proceed to the second location.
Bait: obtain data from the third area
Record data from the device at the furthest point.
Bait: deal with the ambush
A group of mercenaries suddenly surrounded you. Eliminate them.
Bait: return to Nitro
Return to Nitro and tell him what happened.
Narrowing the search: discuss the situation with the Clear Sky leader
It has been established that mercenaries who attacked you were seen with a Clear Sky member. Find Nimble and inform him about the involvement of one of his men in the sabotage.
Narrowing the search: go to the first area and send out a false message
Head to the Misty Forest to transmit a signal to the southern Clear Sky groups.
Narrowing the search: send a false message to the Clear Sky faction
You must send several false messages over the airwaves to narrow down the search for the possible traitor.
Narrowing the search: go to the second area and send out a false message
Head to the Bar to transmit a signal to the northern Clear Sky groups.
Narrowing the search: send a false message to the Clear Sky faction
You must send several false messages over the airwaves to narrow down the search for the possible traitor.
Narrowing the search: talk to Nimble
Report to Nimble that you have transmitted false messages over the airwaves and successfully narrowed down the search area for the extremist agents among the Clear Sky squads.
Assembly: talk to the supplier
Head to the main Duty supplier to obtain the necessary radio parts and other components for assembling bugs for surveillance.
Assembly: return to Nitro
Retrieve a special soldering station from Nitro for assembling the bugs.
Assembly: assemble the bugs
Use the personal soldering station to create special surveillance bugs.
Assembly: talk to Nimble
Discuss the plan with Nimble.
Resolution: head to Garbage
You need to find out which Clear Sky member is the mole. Proceed to their checkpoint in Garbage and deliver the disguised transmitters along with the order from Nimble.
Resolution: check the radio signals
Check the signals received from the bugs.
Resolution: eliminate the group sending the signal
Eliminate those who have been detected using the surveillance bugs.
Resolution: return to Bar
Return to Nitro and report your success.
Resolution: eliminate the group sending the signal
Eliminate those who have been detected using the surveillance bugs.
Resolution: return to Bar
Return to Nitro and report your success.
